hooks.command: jq -c '(.tool_input.url // "") as $u | if ($u | test("^https?://(www\\.)?(x|twitter|mobile\\.twitter)\\.com/")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",updatedInput:(.tool_input + {url:("https://r.jina.ai/" + $u)})}} else empty end'
hooks.statusMessage: Rewriting x.com URL to Jina Reader
